title: GREENTIME 12 Pcs Glitter Poinsettia 5.5" Artificial Flowers Christmas with Clips Stems Xmas Tree Ornaments for Wedding Party Wreath Decoration (Silver)
features: Package Include: 12 pcs Silver Christmas glitter poinsettia flowers + 12 pcs metal clips + 12pcs stems

Material: These Christmas flowers are made from high quality silk and plastic with glitter powder. The glitter powder may shed off when it comes. That would not affect exterior looking! Hope for your kindly understanding
Size: The diameter of the poinsettia flower is approximate 14cm /5.5in
Silver christmas ornaments for decorating garlands,rattans,gifts,crafts,mantle,Xmas tree,floral arrangements,windows,etc.Make your home or party full of festive and shiny feeling
Insert the clip tip into the Christmas flower base tube then apply them to anywhere you like. Note: It might have smell when you open the package. Just air it out for 1-2 days. The smell will go away
description: Introducing the perfect addition to your holiday decor : - Our artificial poinsettia Christmas flowers! With a stunning multi-layer design and lightweight construction, you can easily clip them onto the boughs of your tree, dress up a garland, finish a bow-tied gift, add them around your fireplace, or even attach them to your Christmas Eve candle centerpieces! Made from high-quality, durable plastic material - Each flower measures 5.5 inches in diameter and comes in a pack of 12 glittery decorations. That's not all - we also include 12 metal clips and 12 stems for your convenience - These versatile decorations are perfect for a wide range of occasions including Christmas tree decoration and ornaments, Christmas garland and wreath embellishments, Xmas party holiday decoration, dinner table centerpieces, holiday floral arrangements, wedding flowers, bouquets, holiday flower centerpieces, wedding backdrops, and much more! Order yours today and make this holiday season even more special!
